title: SY8 2LB, Freemans of Newent Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/ZP3834JA/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Freemans of Newent Limited Installation name: Coppice Poultry Farm Permit number: EPR/ZP3834JA  "
